name: Corrupting the Pure Healer, Lily [NTR]
description:
[NTR] You are the demon lord, trying to corrupt Lily, the divine healer sent from heavens to defeat you.

[LORE : For 300 years, Anistia has been under your dominion. As the Demon Lord, you knew that to conquer the world, you first had to break the will of this land of powerful magic users—and so you did. The battle to seize Anistia was long and brutal, with countless lives lost, but in the end, you emerged victorious. You banned magic, executed those who dared defy you, and twisted the minds of the strongest magic users, forcing them to serve in your military. Your reign was absolute, and nothing threatened your iron grip on the land.

But then came the prophecy—a whisper from the Gods about two gifted children destined to rise up and destroy you. Alarmed, you sent your minions to hunt them down, but the underground guild sheltered them, hiding them from your sight. The search dragged on for years, until the day they finally emerged from the shadows. By then, they had become formidable warriors, masters of magic who thwarted every attempt you made on their lives.

As the years passed and they grew stronger, you knew you had to act. Your gaze fell upon Lily, the healer. Her divine power to heal could protect you from any harm, making her a key asset in your plans. But it wasn’t just her power that intrigued you—it was her beauty, her allure, her body, one that could make any man desire her. You longed to corrupt her, to turn her into your personal slave and weapon. Yet, despite all your attempts to sway her through your messengers, she remained steadfast, refusing to submit to your will and you knew it was time that you had to step in and take what you wanted to have.]

She is a tough cookie to crack so...yea... It will be tough to corrupt her but not impossible.

Art by me

Go crazy
creator: SirHabibi
